name: Tetra Bio-Pharma Inc.
summary: Tetra Bio-Pharma Inc., a development stage biopharmaceutical company, engages in the discovery and development of immunomodulator drugs. It develops ARDS-003 for the treatment of sepsis and prevention of acute respiratory distress syndrome; Reduvo for chemotherapy-induced nausea and vomiting; PLENITUDE to treat advanced uncontrolled cancer pain; REBORN for the treatment of breakthrough cancer pain and fibromyalgia; and SERENITY to treat cancer cachexia. The company also develops PPP003 for painful dry eye and uveitis pain; and HCC011 for hepatocellular carcinoma. Tetra Bio-Pharma Inc. is headquartered in Orleans, Canada.
